overall.description: Spider-Man crouches on a skyscraper ledge overlooking a bustling Times Square-style urban intersection. The video game footage shows heavy traffic and crowds below with bright digital billboards illuminating the modern glass architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: skyscraper ledge overlooking Times Square-style intersection

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man is crouched in a predatory pose on the building ledge, surveying the busy street and intersection below

notable_agents.action: flock of birds flying past the building facade

entered.detail: Concrete building ledge where Spider-Man is perched, with metal railing visible
Large red digital billboards with advertisements mounted on the building across the street
Tall modern glass building with reflective windows and purple signage at street level
Wide city avenue with multiple lanes of traffic, crosswalk markings, and yellow taxi cabs
Open pedestrian area at the intersection filled with crowds of people

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man crouches on a high-rise building ledge overlooking a dense urban intersection resembling Times Square. Below, heavy traffic flows through multi-lane streets while pedestrians crowd the crosswalks and plaza. Digital billboards illuminate the glass facades of surrounding skyscrapers as birds occasionally fly past the vantage point.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, high-altitude perspective that captures the overwhelming scale and vibrancy of a modern metropolitan hub. It begins with Spider-Man crouching on a high-rise building ledge, looking down upon a dense urban intersection reminiscent of Times Square. As the camera lingers on the vantage point, the view expands to reveal heavy traffic flowing through multi-lane streets and pedestrians crowding the plazas below. The scene is further defined by the glow of digital billboards illuminating the surrounding glass facades, while birds occasionally fly past to add a sense of depth and movement to the towering cityscape.
